name: Rock Garden (Nek Chand's Rock Garden)
description: A surreal fantasy world built entirely from urban and industrial waste — thousands of sculptures made from broken bangles, tiles, and discarded items spread across 40 acres of winding pathways and waterfalls.
history: Secretly created by road inspector Nek Chand starting in 1957 using recycled waste. Discovered in 1975 and turned into a public attraction. Now has over 5,000 sculptures.
